series.title: Two Faces of the Archmage
series.description: A powerful mage hides a dark secret beneath his noble facade. When an unlikely apprentice discovers the truth, she must choose between exposing him or becoming his accomplice.

series.title: Suffering as a Service
series.description: In a dystopian future, a startup monetizes human misery. One employee discovers the horrifying truth behind their business model and risks everything to expose it.

series.title: Infinite Inning
series.description: A baseball prodigy is trapped reliving the same championship game. To break free, he must uncover why he's stuck and what he's meant to learn.

series.title: High School Drama
series.description: Rivalries, romance, and revenge collide in this elite academy where every student has a secret. The new transfer student is about to shake everything up.
